name: dev-team
description: Multi-agent development team plugin for Claude Code — this repo is both the plugin and its own marketplace.

plugins.name: dev-team
plugins.description: Multi-agent development team: a Project Manager orchestrates Researcher, Code Developer, Code Reviewer, Documenter, Integrator, and a Voice of Reason advisor through a Plan-Research-Develop-Review-Document-Integrate pipeline, with a shared coding-standards interface, built-in analytics, and a human-gated integrator.
